title: AEP v1.1 F15 Criterion Witness Chain Entry
description: v1.1 F15 frontier-break primitive (SPECULATIVE FRONTIER). Three-agent convergence (judge+pathfinder+adversary). Every PLAN.html criterion gets a falsifiable predicate + evidence_kind_required; completion claims emit a CompletionAttestation (see f15_completion_attestation.schema.json) listing per-criterion witness signatures. Closes the forge-says-done-judge-finds-skipped class. Composes_with: sec02 truth-tags, sec41 HCRL, sec73.5 warden-receipts-or-halt, v0.8 F5 self_falsifying, v1.0.3.1 F14 RaterQuorumAttestation.

criterion_text.description: Verbatim criterion text from the PLAN.html. Preserved for sec73.2 operator-verbatim-sacred when criteria are operator-supplied.

falsifiable_predicate_sha256.description: sha256 of the canonical-JSON encoding of a machine-checkable predicate. Predicate format is implementation-defined (Python dotted-path callable, JSONPath assertion, etc.) but MUST resolve to a deterministic pass/fail check at validation time.

evidence_kind_required.description: Allowed evidence kinds the witness MUST present in its CompletionAttestation. Pathfinder + judge converge on enumerated kinds; adversary mandates the structural enforcement.

plan_path.description: Repo-relative path to the PLAN.html (or PLAN.md) that owns this criterion.

owner_role.description: Canonical owner role responsible for emitting the matching CompletionAttestation.

supersedes_criterion_id.description: If this criterion supersedes a prior one (e.g., during plan revision), link the prior. Forms the criterion DAG natively.

blocking_severity.description: If BLOCK, completion claim CANNOT promote without a passing witness signature for this criterion. WARN = packet validates with warning. INFO = informational only.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC when this criterion was canonicalized.

examples.criterion_text: All 15 schemas validate clean under jsonschema lib with additionalProperties:false on top-level.
